mapper.select: SELECT * FROM target_person WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM target_person WHERE id_card_no = #{idCardNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM target_person WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM target_person WHERE person_type = #{personType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM target_person WHERE police_station_code = #{stationCode} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
